localScenarioMismatch.limitation: Локальный snapshot не содержит заявленный 25 567-row импорт; replay использует доступный локальный active catalog и локальный import file. Target-count flags can create a count-bounded approximation, but it is reported separately.

activeLabelShadow.note: Active-label shadow evaluation only. Existing catalog labels are treated as local reference data; this is not a human precision audit.
